evals.prompt: Sync my weekly meal plan shopping list to Reminders
evals.expected_output: Reads Weekly Meal Plan.md, extracts all items from the Shopping List section, checks for duplicates against existing Shopping reminders, adds new items via remindctl, and reports a summary
expectations: Reads the Weekly Meal Plan wiki page
Extracts items from the Shopping List section
Checks existing Shopping list for duplicates before adding
Adds items using remindctl add --list Shopping
Reports count of added, skipped, and total items

evals.prompt: Add the shopping list from Weekend Meal Plan to my reminders
evals.expected_output: Reads Weekend Meal Plan.md, extracts items from the Shopping List section, deduplicates against existing Shopping reminders, adds new items, and reports summary
expectations: Reads the Weekend Meal Plan wiki page
Extracts items from the Shopping List section
Checks existing Shopping list for duplicates before adding
Adds items using remindctl add --list Shopping
Reports count of added, skipped, and total items

evals.prompt: Update my shopping list from both meal plans
evals.expected_output: Reads both Weekly Meal Plan and Weekend Meal Plan, merges their shopping lists, deduplicates against existing Shopping reminders and between the two lists, adds new items, and reports summary
expectations: Reads both Weekly Meal Plan and Weekend Meal Plan wiki pages
Merges items from both Shopping List sections
Deduplicates between the two source lists
Checks existing Shopping list for duplicates before adding
Adds items using remindctl add --list Shopping
Reports count of added, skipped, and total items
